steps.title: Combine the constants
steps.content:
The left side has $4+9=13$, so the equation becomes
$$
p+13=12
$$

steps.title: Subtract from both sides
steps.content: Subtract $13$ from both sides to isolate $p$: $$ p=12-13=-1 $$ The positive choices would make $p+13$ greater than $12$, so they cannot work. The answer is A.
